title: Manufacturing Engineer - Siemens India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Siemens India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? Siemens India in Surat offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens India:
Siemens India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
